title: Methods for detecting malignant colon conditions
abstract: Methods and systems directed to detecting malignant colon conditions are disclosed. The method comprises processing a biological sample obtained from the subject to generate data indicative of a distribution of a plurality of populations of microbes of different types in the biological sample. A presence, absence, or relative amount of individual populations of microbes of the plurality of populations of microbes may be indicative of a malignant colon condition. Next, a trained algorithm may be to process the data to determine the presence, absence, or relative amount of the individual populations of microbes. Finally, based on the presence, absence, or relative amount, the subject may be identified as having the malignant colon condition, such as, for example, in a report.
